text.title: GitOps — Core Principles Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Hotfix lost on next reconcile; nobody knew why.
antipattern.fix: Mandate Git PR with break-glass procedure for emergencies.

antipattern.symptom: Bash script kubectl-runs jobs; not reproducible.
antipattern.fix: Refactor into Helm chart / Kustomize / YAML in Git.

antipattern.symptom: Drift undetected for weeks until incident.
antipattern.fix: Set sync interval ≤3min and alert on out-of-sync.
Wire ArgoCD/Flux metrics into Grafana with alert.
